clipboard_copy.description: Indicates the PRA Clipboard Copy function

clipboard_paste.description: Indicates the PRA Clipboard Paste function

file_download.description: Indicates the PRA File Transfer capabilities that enables the File Download function

file_upload.description: Indicates the PRA File Transfer capabilities that enables the File Upload function

inspect_file_download.description: Inspects the file via ZIA sandbox (if you have set up the ZIA cloud and the Integrations settings) and downloads the file following the inspection

inspect_file_upload.description: Inspects the file via ZIA sandbox (if you have set up the ZIA cloud and the Integrations settings) and uploads the file following the inspection

monitor_session.description: Indicates the PRA Monitoring Capabilities to enable the PRA Session Monitoring function

record_session.description: Indicates the PRA Session Recording capabilities to enable PRA Session Recording

share_session.description: Indicates the PRA Session Control and Monitoring capabilities to enable PRA Session Monitoring

access_uninspected_file.description: Allows a User like an Admin to see all files marked Uninspected from other users in the tenant.

delete_file.description: Allows a User to delete files to reclaim space. Allowing deletion will prevent auditing of the file.

request_approvals.description: Allows a User to request approvals

review_approvals.description: Allows a User to review approvals

email_ids.description: The email address of the user that you are assigning the privileged approval to

end_time.description: The end date that the user no longer has access to the privileged approval

id.description: The unique identifier of the privileged approval

microtenant_id.description: The unique identifier of the Microtenant for the ZPA tenant. If you are within the Default Microtenant, pass microtenantId as 0 when making requests to retrieve data from the Default Microtenant.

start_time.description: The start date that the user has access to the privileged approval

status.description: The status of the privileged approval

id.description: The unique identifier of the pra application segment

days.description: The days of the week that you want to enable the privileged approval

end_time.description: The end time that the user no longer has access to the privileged approval

end_time_cron.description: The cron expression provided to configure the privileged approval end time working hours. The standard cron expression format is [Seconds][Minutes][Hours][Day of the Month][Month][Day of the Week][Year]The cron expression provided to configure the privileged approval end time working hours. The standard cron expression format is [Seconds][Minutes][Hours][Day of the Month][Month][Day of the Week][Year]

start_time.description: The start time that the user has access to the privileged approval

start_time_cron.description: The cron expression provided to configure the privileged approval start time working hours. The standard cron expression format is [Seconds][Minutes][Hours][Day of the Month][Month][Day of the Week][Year]

timezone.description: The time zone for the time window of a privileged approval

description.description: The description of the privileged console

enabled.description: Whether or not the privileged console is enabled

icon_text.description: The privileged console icon. The icon image is converted to base64 encoded text format

id.description: The unique identifier of the privileged console

microtenant_id.description: The unique identifier of the Microtenant for the ZPA tenant. If you are within the Default Microtenant, pass microtenantId as 0 when making requests to retrieve data from the Default Microtenant.

name.description: The name of the privileged console

id.description: The unique identifier of the privileged portal

credential_type.description: The protocol type that was designated for that particular privileged credential. The protocol type options are SSH, RDP, and VNC. Each protocol type has its own credential requirements.

description.description: The description of the privileged credential

id.description: The unique identifier of the privileged credential

microtenant_id.description: The unique identifier of the Microtenant for the ZPA tenant. If you are within the Default Microtenant, pass microtenantId as 0 when making requests to retrieve data from the Default Microtenant.

name.description: The name of the privileged credential

passphrase.description: The password that is used to protect the SSH private key. This field is optional

password.description: The password associated with the username for the login you want to use for the privileged credential

private_key.description: The SSH private key associated with the username for the login you want to use for the privileged credential

user_domain.description: The domain name associated with the username. The domain name only needs to be specified with logging in to an RDP console that is connected to an Active Directory Domain

username.description: The username for the login you want to use for the privileged credential

credential_type.description: The protocol type that was designated for that particular privileged credential. The protocol type options are SSH, RDP, and VNC. Each protocol type has its own credential requirements.

id.description: The unique identifier of the privileged credential

microtenant_id.description: The unique identifier of the Microtenant for the ZPA tenant. If you are within the Default Microtenant, pass microtenantId as 0 when making requests to retrieve data from the Default Microtenant.

name.description: The name of the privileged credential

block.description: List of PRA Credentials

certificate_id.description: The unique identifier of the certificate

description.description: The description of the privileged portal

domain.description: The domain of the privileged portal

enabled.description: Whether or not the privileged portal is enabled

ext_domain.description: The external domain name prefix of the Browser Access application that is used for Zscaler-managed certificates when creating a privileged portal.

ext_domain_name.description: The domain suffix for the privileged portal URL. This field must be one of the customer's authentication domains.

ext_domain_translation.description: The translation of the external domain name prefix of the Browser Access application that is used for Zscaler-managed certificates when creating a privileged portal.

ext_label.description: The domain prefix for the privileged portal URL. The supported string can include numbers, lower case characters, and only supports a hyphen (-).

id.description: The unique identifier of the privileged portal

microtenant_id.description: The unique identifier of the Microtenant for the ZPA tenant. If you are within the Default Microtenant, pass microtenantId as 0 when making requests to retrieve data from the Default Microtenant. Pass microtenantId as null to retrieve data from all customers associated with the tenant.

name.description: The name of the privileged portal

user_notification.description: The notification message displayed in the banner of the privileged portallink, if enabled

user_notification_enabled.description: Indicates if the Notification Banner is enabled (true) or disabled (false)

user_portal_gid.description: The unique identifier of the user portal.

city_country.description: City and country of the Private Cloud Group

country_code.description: Country code of the Private Cloud Group

description.description: Description of the Private Cloud Group

enabled.description: Whether this Private Cloud Group is enabled or not

is_public.description: Whether the Private Cloud Group is public

latitude.description: Latitude of the Private Cloud Group. Integer or decimal. With values in the range of -90 to 90

location.description: Location of the Private Cloud Group

longitude.description: Longitude of the Private Cloud Group. Integer or decimal. With values in the range of -180 to 180

microtenant_id.description: Microtenant ID for the Private Cloud Group

name.description: Name of the Private Cloud Group

override_version_profile.description: Whether the default version profile of the Private Cloud Group is applied or overridden

site_id.description: Site ID for the Private Cloud Group

upgrade_day.description: Private Cloud Controllers in this group will attempt to update to a newer version of the software during this specified day

upgrade_time_in_secs.description: Private Cloud Controllers in this group will attempt to update to a newer version of the software during this specified time. Integer in seconds (i.e., -66600). The integer should be greater than or equal to 0 and less than 86400, in 15 minute intervals

version_profile_id.description: ID of the version profile for the Private Cloud Group

app_connector_group_name.description: Read only property. Applicable only for GET calls, ignored in PUT/POST calls.

association_type.description: Specifies the provisioning key type for App Connectors or ZPA Private Service Edges. The supported values are CONNECTOR_GRP and SERVICE_EDGE_GRP.

enabled.description: Whether the provisioning key is enabled or not. Supported values: true, false

enrollment_cert_id.description: ID of the enrollment certificate that can be used for this provisioning key.

max_usage.description: The maximum number of instances where this provisioning key can be used for enrolling an App Connector or Service Edge.

name.description: Name of the provisioning key.

provisioning_key.description: The provisioning key returned by the API. This value is required to onboard App Connector or Service Edge devices. Although marked as sensitive to prevent exposure in logs and console output, the value is stored in the Terraform state file and can be retrieved using 'terraform output' or by referencing the attribute in other resources.

zcomponent_id.description: ID of the existing App Connector or Service Edge Group.

zcomponent_name.description: Read only property. Applicable only for GET calls, ignored in PUT/POST calls.

description.description: Description of the app group.

enabled.description: Whether this app group is enabled or not.

name.description: Name of the app group.

description.description: This field is the description of the server group.

dynamic_discovery.description: This field controls dynamic discovery of the servers.

enabled.description: This field defines if the server group is enabled or disabled.

extranet_enabled.description: Enable extranet for this policy rule.

name.description: This field defines the name of the server group.

block.description: This field is a json array of app-connector-id only.

id.description: Location ID.

block.description: List of location DTOs.

id.description: Location Group ID.

block.description: List of location group DTOs.
Extranet configuration for the policy rule.

This field is a list of servers that are applicable only when dynamic discovery is disabled. Server name is required only in cases where the new servers need to be created in this API. For existing servers, pass only the serverId.

city.description: City for the Service Edge Group.

description.description: Description of the Service Edge Group.

enabled.description: Whether this Service Edge Group is enabled or not.

enrollment_cert_id.description: ID of the enrollment certificate that can be used for OAuth2 enrollment. If not set, the provider will automatically look up the 'Service Edge' enrollment certificate by name.

exclusive_for_business_continuity.description: Indicates whether the Service Edge Group is exclusive for business continuity.

grace_distance_enabled.description: If enabled, allows ZPA Private Service Edge Groups within the specified distance to be prioritized over a closer ZPA Public Service Edge.

grace_distance_value.description: Indicates the maximum distance in miles or kilometers to ZPA Private Service Edge groups that would override a ZPA Public Service Edge

grace_distance_value_unit.description: Indicates the grace distance unit of measure in miles or kilometers. This value is only required if grace_distance_value is set to true

is_public.description: Enable or disable public access for the Service Edge Group.

latitude.description: Latitude for the Service Edge Group.

location.description: Location for the Service Edge Group.

longitude.description: Longitude for the Service Edge Group.

name.description: Name of the Service Edge Group.

override_version_profile.description: Whether the default version profile of the App Connector Group is applied or overridden.

upgrade_day.description: Service Edges in this group will attempt to update to a newer version of the software during this specified day.

upgrade_time_in_secs.description: Service Edges in this group will attempt to update to a newer version of the software during this specified time.

user_codes.description: User codes from deployed Service Edge VMs for OAuth2 enrollment. When provided, the provider will call the user code verification API to enroll the service edges. These codes are obtained from the Service Edge VM after deployment.

version_profile_name.description: Name of the version profile. To learn more, see Version Profile Use Cases. This value is required, if the value for overrideVersionProfile is set to true

block.description: WARNING: Service edge membership is managed externally. Specifying this field will enforce exact membership matching.This field will be deprecated in future versions
List of trusted network IDs.

microtenant_id.description: Microtenant ID

name.description: Name of the tag group

tags.description: Set of tag value IDs associated with this tag group

enabled.description: Whether this tag key is enabled

microtenant_id.description: Microtenant ID

name.description: Name of the tag key

namespace_id.description: ID of the tag namespace this key belongs to

origin.description: Origin of the tag key. Defaults to CUSTOM

type.description: Type of the tag key. Defaults to STATIC

name.description: Name of the tag value

block.description: Tag values associated with this tag key

description.description: Description of the tag namespace

enabled.description: Whether this tag namespace is enabled

microtenant_id.description: Microtenant ID

name.description: Name of the tag namespace

origin.description: Origin of the tag namespace. Defaults to CUSTOM

type.description: Type of the tag namespace. Defaults to STATIC

certificate_id.description: Certificate ID for the User Portal Controller

description.description: Description of the User Portal Controller

domain.description: Domain for the User Portal Controller

enabled.description: Whether this User Portal Controller is enabled or not

ext_domain.description: External domain for the User Portal Controller

ext_domain_name.description: External domain name for the User Portal Controller

ext_domain_translation.description: External domain translation for the User Portal Controller

ext_label.description: External label for the User Portal Controller

microtenant_id.description: Microtenant ID for the User Portal Controller

name.description: Name of the User Portal Controller

user_notification.description: User notification message for the User Portal Controller

user_notification_enabled.description: Whether user notifications are enabled for the User Portal Controller

application_id.description: Application ID for the User Portal Link

description.description: Description of the User Portal Link

enabled.description: Whether this User Portal Link is enabled or not

icon_text.description: Icon text for the User Portal Link

link.description: Link URL for the User Portal Link

link_path.description: Link path for the User Portal Link

microtenant_id.description: Microtenant ID for the User Portal Link

name.description: Name of the User Portal Link

protocol.description: Protocol for the User Portal Link

block.description: List of User Portals

zia_cloud_domain.description: ZIA cloud domain (without .net suffix). Valid values: zscaler, zscloud, zscalerone, zscalertwo, zscalerthree, zscalerbeta, zscalergov, zscalerten, zspreview

zia_cloud_service_api_key.description: ZIA cloud service API key (write-only, not returned by API)

zia_password.description: ZIA password (write-only, not returned by API)

zia_sandbox_api_token.description: ZIA sandbox API token (write-only, not returned by API)
